name: ast_grep
description: Structural search across the workspace using AST patterns (powered by ast-grep, see https://ast-grep.github.io). Use for queries that grep can't safely express (e.g., 'all call sites of foo() where the first arg is a literal'). Falls back to no results if the language's parser isn't installed; never errors.

pattern.description: ast-grep pattern. Metavariables use `$NAME`; see ast-grep docs for the full pattern grammar.

language.description: Source language. Drives parser selection. Must be one of the bundled tree-sitter grammars.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute root for the search.

metavars.description: Captured `$NAME` metavariables and their matched text.
